Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor Xandrine Griffin
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Minor: Xzeric Griffin
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor Xandrine Griffin
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Nov-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Karleen Griffin appearing on her own behalf and as parent to minors Xandrine Griffin and Xzeric Griffin.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the court ordered matter continued to 11/21/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Petitioner to submit proposed Orders for the Approval of Minor's Claim and Orders for Deposit of the money into blocked accounts at least five days before the hearing.
Court adjourned.

Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Minor: Xzeric Griffin
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Nov-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Karleen Griffin appearing on her own behalf and as parent to minors Xandrine Griffin and Xzeric Griffin.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the court ordered matter continued to 11/21/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Petitioner to submit proposed Orders for the Approval of Minor's Claim and Orders for Deposit of the money into blocked accounts at least five days before the hearing.
Court adjourned.
